# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: backup-bucket
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    retentionPolicy:
      isLocked: false
    billing:
      requesterPays: false
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    labels: {}
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: ""
      notFoundPage: ""
    cors:
    - maxAgeSeconds: 0
      method: []
      origin: []
      responseHeader: []
    logging:
      logBucket: ""
      logObjectPrefix: ""
    owner: ""
    project: ""
    selfLink: ""
    size: 0
    timeCreated: ""
    updated: ""
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    lifecycle:
      rule: []
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: false
      publicAccessPrevention: "inherited"

      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
